---
name: Research claim
about: Propose a measurable claim for the architecture
title: "[Claim]: "
labels: research
assignees: ""
---

## Claim

State the measurable claim in one sentence.

## Probe Or Benchmark

Which probe or benchmark should validate it?

Checklist:

- [ ] Links to an existing test, probe, benchmark, or schema
- [ ] Adds or updates an evaluation fixture if the claim is new
- [ ] Adds or updates a safety policy fixture if behavior crosses a safety boundary
- [ ] Updates documentation describing limits and non-claims

## Data Required

What fixture, telemetry, or runtime data is required?

## Limitations

What does this claim not prove?
